zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Fraunceys於1315年出生在英國武斯特斯爾培斯爾時，她的父親John de Fraunceys28歲，母親Mrs John Fraunceys34歲。她與Giles de Throckmorton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1390年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年75歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Fraunceys于1315年出生在英国武斯特斯爾培斯爾时，她的父亲John de Fraunceys28岁，母亲Mrs John Fraunceys34岁。她与Giles de Throckmorton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1390年在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年75岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Fraunceys was born in 1315, in Pershore, Worcestershire, England, her father, John de Fraunceys, was 28 and her mother, Mrs John Fraunceys, was 34. She married Giles de Throckmorton. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1390, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Fraunceys est née en 1315, à Pershore, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Fraunceys, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Fraunceys, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Giles de Throckmorton. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1390, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.St. Albans, Hertfordshire, England: St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Fraunceys 1315 in Pershore, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Fraunceys 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs John Fraunceys 34. Sie hat Giles de Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 75 Jahren in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Giles de Throckmorton. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1390, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Fraunceysが1315年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアペルショアで生まれた時，父John de Fraunceysは28歳，母Mrs John Fraunceysは34歳であった。Giles de Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1390年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで75歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Fraunceys(이)가 1315년 영국 워스스터실르 퍼쇼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Fraunceys(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John Fraunceys(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Giles de Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Giles de Throckmorton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Fraunceys родилась в 1315 г. в местности пиршаур, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Fraunceys было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Fraunceys, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Giles de Throckmorton. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1390 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия.

Se casó con Giles de Throckmorton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
